name: Vaccine Tax Credit or Refund

eligibility.description: Claim must be filed within 6 months of return or destruction, and the taxpayer must establish they repaid the tax to the ultimate purchaser or obtained their consent.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can claim a refund or credit for excise taxes paid on vaccines that are later returned to the manufacturer (other than for resale) or destroyed.
